Architecture

Native all the way down

Every pixel is rendered by AppKit and Metal. The editor uses a rope for O(log n) text operations. The terminal runs through libghostty's Zig engine.

No 500 MB RAM baseline. No spinning beach balls. Just a macOS app that respects your machine.

Native Stack
Interface Swift 6 + AppKit
L1
Editor Core CoreText + Rope
L2
Terminal libghostty (Zig)
L3
Rendering Metal
L4
Intelligence LSP + Tree-sitter
L5
Persistence SQLite
L6
